free_text: Dense attached transaction grid. Group headers visible include "Monte and Usha Ahuja 2010 Irrev Trust FBO Grandchildren", "Ahuja Grandchildren's Education Trust", and "Ahuja Khanna Children's Trust". Tesseract text is available at docs/2022-2/tess/page-003.txt but row-level checkbox alignment requires further manual review.

uncertainties.note: Dense grid page; automated OCR was not reliable enough to write row-level transaction data without risking skipped or misaligned rows.
